titleStmt.title: SII 36.227: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 227. (A.R. No. 227 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the same slab lying in the courtyard of the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. Gift of 120 kāḍi of paddy for sacred food offerings to the deity Umā, consecrated by Cheṅgalaṅ-kiḻān Tiruveḷikāṇippaṭṭan in the Mahādēva temple at Tiruvalidāyil in Tuḍamuṇināḍu, a subdivision of Puliyūrk-kōṭṭam. The priests of the central shrine of the temple accepted the paddy as deposit and agreed to maintain the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyun taṉakkeyuri
mai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi
kaṅka pāṭiyum nuḷampa pāṭiyun=taṭikai pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ ko
llamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻ tara Īḻamaṇṭalamun=ti
ṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiyuḷ E
llāyāṇṭun=toḻuteḻa viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyaraic tecu koḷ
śrī kovirājarājakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājadevarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 3] Āvatu puli
yūrk koṭṭattu tuṭamuṇi nāṭṭu tiruvalitāyil mahādevarkku paṇi ceykiṟa Uṇ
ṇāḻikai Uṭaiyoṅ kaiyyeḻuttu Ivvūr ceṅkaḻaṅkiḻān ti
ruveḷikāṇip paṭṭan pakkaliyāṅkaḷ koṇṭu
nūṟṟarupatiṉ kāṭi Innellukku palicaiyāka Ivar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Umā
�ttu Iru nāḻi t tiruvamutu cantirātittavaṟ celva
Digital edition of SII 36.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
